meta.title: Telegram Bot Guide | NexGen
meta.description: Step-by-step guide to creating a Telegram Bot.

pageTitle: How to Create a Telegram Bot
pageSubtitle: Takes just 2 minutes. Follow the steps below.

1.title: Open BotFather
1.line1: Search for @BotFather on Telegram and start a conversation.

2.title: Create a New Bot
2.line2: Enter a display name for your bot (e.g. “My AI Assistant”).
2.line3: Enter a username for your bot (must end with bot, e.g. my_ai_assistant_bot).

3.title: Copy the Bot Token
3.line1: BotFather will reply with a Token (format: 123456789:ABCdefGHIjklMNOpqrsTUVwxyz).
3.line2: Paste this Token into our setup form.

4.title: Find Your Telegram User ID
4.line1: Search for @userinfobot on Telegram and start a conversation.
4.line2: Send any message, and the bot will reply with your User ID (a number).
4.line3: Paste this ID into the setup form.

doneCta: All done? Go back to the setup form
